name: rtime-context
description: Read-only ContextUnlockPlan and Context Pack planning for rtime assistant workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Plan and explain dynamic context unlocking.
interface.longDescription: Rtime Context provides read-only ContextUnlockPlan, Context Pack skeleton, and why-context explanation surfaces for routing tasks across workspace, brain, rtime-hub, runtime evidence, and sensitive-exclusion policies.
defaultPrompt: Explain why this context should be loaded.
